hooks.command: $s = git diff HEAD --name-only; if ($s) { '{"systemMessage": "Source files modified - update CONTEXT.md and memory files if not done."}' }

$r = npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { '{"systemMessage": "TypeScript type-check failed!", "hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "Stop", "additionalContext": "TypeScript type-check FAILED. Run npx tsc --noEmit, fix all errors, re-run to confirm clean, then complete."}}' }
